description: DPoP token replay across resource servers — RFC 9449 + 2024 disclosures

rs_audience_missing.description: Resource server does not validate DPoP 'htu' (HTTP URI) or 'htm' (HTTP method) — token usable on any RS

probes.payload: <replay DPoP proof from RS-A to RS-B>
probes.description: If RS-B accepts a proof minted for RS-A's htu, audience binding is broken

jti_replay.description: Server does not cache DPoP jti — same proof reusable

probes.payload: <replay same DPoP proof twice within iat+60s window>
probes.description: Second replay succeeds → no jti cache
